title: Maxtags
text: Maxtags Set the maximum number of tags that can be dynamically updated while typing in the ProcScript Editor. Valid values are whole numbers 0 and higher. The default is 20 . " maxtags = Number " This is a static property and can only be set in the initialization file. Description As you enter ProcScript, Uniface dynamically updates the Tags in the ProcScript Editor. If a trigger contains many operations or entries, this can significantly degrade performance. To prevent this, the maxtags property defines the maximum number of operations, entries, or triggers a development object can have before dynamic updates are stopped. In this case, the Tags tree is not updated as you type, but it is updated on other actions, such as cut and paste or new data being added to the object. By default, the dynamic updates stop when the number of entries, operations, and triggers is larger than 20. You can increase or decrease this number by setting the property in the RichEdit widget in usys.ini : [widgets] ... ; Custom widgets for development environment RichEdit=urichedit(font=procboxfont;procbox=on;maxtags=100) Copy Was this topic helpful?
